items.name_en: Triomphe Full Leather Series. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
items.name_cn:
Triomphe Full Leather Series. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
I have a special fondness for this brand, whether it's the old or new styles, I really like them~ Smooth calfskin, the texture is truly so high-end. Carrying it feels like carrying an Hermès (perfect for a little humblebrag). Besides solid colors, there's also the Triomphe canvas series, really hard to choose. I decided to ALL IN, you can learn from me. Great for styling, very spacious. Daily items like lipstick, compact powder, wallet, and phone all fit.
size:20*10*4
Search Style No.: 19414

items.name_en: Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
items.name_cn:
Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
The straw bag sways with scattered light spots, holding orange soda, flower skirt hems, and even a spontaneous journey to mountains and seas, firmly holding the ritual of summer in your hand

items.name_en: Which Celine summer bag to choose?
items.name_cn:

I feel the straw bag is more summery!
